workspace.name: Northline Ops
workspace.description: Operational memory for the platform team and recovery reviews.

services.name: Edge API
services.summary: Public API for tenant traffic and operator workflows.

services.name: Ledger DB
services.summary: Primary PostgreSQL cluster for operational state.

services.name: Event Worker
services.summary: Processes incident exports and review reminders.

runbooks.title: Edge API degradation response
runbooks.summary: Triage rising latency and switch traffic if saturation persists.
runbooks.body: 1. Confirm latency increase in Grafana. 2. Check worker backlog and DB saturation. 3. If queue delay exceeds 10 minutes, divert bulk exports. 4. If database pressure continues, fail read-heavy traffic to the replica pool.

runbooks.title: Ledger DB restore procedure
runbooks.summary: Restore from the latest base backup and replay WAL to target.
runbooks.body: 1. Freeze writes. 2. Promote the warm standby if healthy. 3. If promotion fails, restore the latest validated backup. 4. Replay WAL until the selected recovery target. 5. Verify replication and resume traffic.

incidents.title: Edge API latency spike during export window
incidents.summary: Latency rose above SLO when the export worker backlog cascaded into the public API.

timeline.body: Paused bulk exports and cleared queue pressure.
timeline.author: Morgan Silva

postmortems.title: Export backlog saturation
postmortems.summary: Queue growth and weak alerting delayed mitigation while API pods absorbed extra work.
contributingFactors: Queue alert thresholds were tuned for normal throughput only.
The runbook did not describe the export-diversion path clearly.

followUps.title: Revise API degradation runbook with diversion step

drills.title: Quarterly Ledger DB restore drill
drills.notes: Restore completed inside RTO, but WAL replay validation took longer than expected.

evidence.label: Drill worksheet
evidence.notes: Includes timing checkpoints and validation output.
